bp_title: Enable tracing for agents and RAG workflows
question: How do you maintain traceability for your models, prompts, and assets?
bp_implementation_guidance: Instrument generative AI workloads so that every agent invocation and RAG retrieval is traceable end-to-end: capture spans for model calls, tool/agent steps, and retrieval queries, correlate them with a shared trace/request ID, and persist them to an observability backend so any decision can be reconstructed after the fact.
step_title: Instrument agents and RAG workflows with end-to-end distributed tracing
step_verbatim: Enable tracing across agent orchestration and RAG pipelines so that each model call, tool invocation, and retrieval step emits a correlated span under a single trace ID, allowing the full reasoning and retrieval path behind any output to be reconstructed.
